'''âs-b-d''' ('''sabada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:worldproof|worldproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:worldproof|worldproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-b-d
|-
! Lemma
| sabada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sabadithi|sabadithi]] || [[word:sabadiji|sabadiji]] || [[word:sabadishi|sabadishi]] || [[word:sabadi|sabadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabaduthuth|sabaduthuth]] || [[word:sabadujuj|sabadujuj]] || [[word:sabadushush|sabadushush]] || [[word:sabad|sabad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabaduthu|sabaduthu]] || [[word:sabaduju|sabaduju]] || [[word:sabadushu|sabadushu]] || [[word:sabadu|sabadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabadufuth|sabadufuth]] || [[word:sabadufuj|sabadufuj]] || [[word:sabadufush|sabadufush]] || [[word:sabaduf|sabaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sabadethe|sabadethe]] || [[word:sabadeje|sabadeje]] || [[word:sabadeshe|sabadeshe]] || [[word:sabade|sabade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabadothoth|sabadothoth]] || [[word:sabadojoj|sabadojoj]] || [[word:sabadoshosh|sabadoshosh]] || [[word:sabad|sabad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabadotho|sabadotho]] || [[word:sabadojo|sabadojo]] || [[word:sabadosho|sabadosho]] || [[word:sabado|sabado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabadofoth|sabadofoth]] || [[word:sabadofoj|sabadofoj]] || [[word:sabadofosh|sabadofosh]] || [[word:sabadof|sabadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sabadĂŠthĂŠ|sabadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sabadĂŠjĂŠ|sabadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sabadĂŠshĂŠ|sabadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sabadĂŠ|sabadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabadathath|sabadathath]] || [[word:sabadajaj|sabadajaj]] || [[word:sabadashash|sabadashash]] || [[word:sabad|sabad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabadatha|sabadatha]] || [[word:sabadaja|sabadaja]] || [[word:sabadasha|sabadasha]] || [[word:sabada|sabada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabadafath|sabadafath]] || [[word:sabadafaj|sabadafaj]] || [[word:sabadafash|sabadafash]] || [[word:sabadaf|sabadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sabadasha|sabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosabadasha|gosabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisabadasha|gokisabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sabadnĂŒsha|sabadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosabadnknĂŒsha|gosabadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisabadnĂŒsha|gokisabadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sabadshĂ«sha|sabadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosabadnkshĂ«sha|gosabadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisabadshĂ«sha|gokisabadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sabadrosha|sabadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosabadnkrosha|gosabadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisabadrosha|gokisabadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sabadmusha|sabadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosabadnkmusha|gosabadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisabadmusha|gokisabadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sabadsherasha|sabadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosabadnksherasha|gosabadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisabadsherasha|gokisabadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sabadngasha|sabadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosabadnkngasha|gosabadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisabadngasha|gokisabadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sabadyasha|sabadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosabadnkyasha|gosabadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisabadyasha|gokisabadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sabadyamasha|sabadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosabadnkyamasha|gosabadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisabadyamasha|gokisabadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sabadnĂŒshĂ«sha|sabadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosabadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosabadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisabadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisabadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sabadnĂŒrosha|sabadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosabadnknĂŒrosha|gosabadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisabadnĂŒrosha|gokisabadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sabadnĂŒmusha|sabadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosabadnknĂŒmusha|gosabadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisabadnĂŒmusha|gokisabadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sabadshĂ«nĂŒsha|sabadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosabadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosabadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisabadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisabadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sabadshĂ«rosha|sabadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosabadnkshĂ«rosha|gosabadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisabadshĂ«rosha|gokisabadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sabadshĂ«musha|sabadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosabadnkshĂ«musha|gosabadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisabadshĂ«musha|gokisabadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sabadronĂŒsha|sabadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosabadnkronĂŒsha|gosabadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisabadronĂŒsha|gokisabadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sabadroshĂ«sha|sabadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosabadnkroshĂ«sha|gosabadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisabadroshĂ«sha|gokisabadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sabadromusha|sabadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosabadnkromusha|gosabadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisabadromusha|gokisabadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sabadmunĂŒsha|sabadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosabadnkmunĂŒsha|gosabadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisabadmunĂŒsha|gokisabadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sabadmushĂ«sha|sabadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosabadnkmushĂ«sha|gosabadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisabadmushĂ«sha|gokisabadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sabadmurosha|sabadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosabadnkmurosha|gosabadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisabadmurosha|gokisabadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sabad|sabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠbĂŠd|sĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosabad|hosabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠbĂŠd|hosĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosabad|hohosabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠbĂŠd|hohosĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsabad|nĂŒsabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŒsĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsabad|nĂŒnĂŒsabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsabad|nĂŻsabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŻsĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsabad|nĂŻnĂŻsabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusabad|lusabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠbĂŠd|lusĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusabad|lulusabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠbĂŠd|lulusĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisabad|lisabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠbĂŠd|lisĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisabad|lilisabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠbĂŠd|lilisĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosabad|kosabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠbĂŠd|kosĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosabad|kokosabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠbĂŠd|kokosĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesabad|kesabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠbĂŠd|kesĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesabad|kekesabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠbĂŠd|kekesĂŠbĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
